message:
Running command: # cli.py line 473: pdk_resolve_wrapper - it's resolving PDK internally to 8afc8346!
# This means librelane has a hardcoded PDK version it expects for sky130A.
# It's not using /nc/pdk directly but resolving to a specific version.
# Let's look at the pdk_resolve_wrapper source
grep -n "8afc8346\|pdk_resolve\|PDK_VERSION\|sky130A" \
    /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/flows/cli.py 2>/dev/null | head -15
